{{ "blog.back" | t }}

{{ "authors.lede" | t }}

{# Iterate the data-file registry (every declared author) rather than site.authors (only authors with at least one post), so team members without posts still appear. A profile page only exists once an author has a post, so those cards stay non-clickable. Profiles are emitted per language, so lang_prefix keeps the reader in theirs. #}
    {% for key, author in site.data.authors %} {% set has_posts = site.authors[key] is defined and site.authors[key] %}
  • {% if has_posts %}{% else %}
    {% endif %} {% if author.image %} {% endif %}
    {{ author.name | default(key) }} {% if author.team %}{{ "authors.team" | t }}{% endif %} {% if author.role %}{{ author.role }}{% endif %} {% if author.bio %}{{ author.bio }}{% endif %}
    {% if has_posts %}    {% else %}
    {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
